resurface.template_zh: 你 {n} 回合前封存的【{title}】被翻了出来——{consequence}
resurface.template_en: Your sealed record from {n} rounds ago — {title} — has resurfaced: {consequence}

pressure_thresholds.title_en: The Four Horsemen Send Their Calendar
pressure_thresholds.text_zh: 饥荒希望确认下午茶座位是否朝南。瘟疫附了一份过敏原清单。战争抱歉迟回邮件——他正在「调研」。死亡保持沉默，他的字体是 Comic Sans。
pressure_thresholds.text_en: Famine asks whether the afternoon-tea seats face south. Pestilence attached an allergens list. War apologized for the late reply — he's been 'researching.' Death said nothing. His font is Comic Sans.

pressure_thresholds.text_zh: 天堂与地狱二十个世纪以来第一次签署同一份文件——主题是你拖得太久了。备忘录边角有一杯印迹，看起来像可可。
pressure_thresholds.text_en: For the first time in twenty centuries, Heaven and Hell co-signed a single document. Its subject: you have delayed too long. A round stain in one corner looks faintly like cocoa.
